tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List the most recent posts on the Radixia blog (AI, serverless, open source, cloud). Returns title, slug, date, tags and excerpt for each.

tools.name: search_posts
tools.description: Full-text search across all Radixia blog posts (title, excerpt and body). Use this to find what Radixia has written about a topic, e.g. 'MCP', 'Bedrock', 'event driven'.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Read the full text of a Radixia blog post by its slug (get the slug from list_posts or search_posts).

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List the topic tags used on the Radixia blog, with post counts.

tools.name: search_isc2026_transcripts
tools.description: Full-text search across 147 auto-generated session transcripts from ISC High Performance 2026 (Hamburg, June 23-25): keynotes, panels, vendor talks, research papers. Returns matching passages with session title, day/time/hall and recording timestamp. Quoted phrases must match exactly.

tools.name: get_isc2026_session
tools.description: Read the full auto-generated transcript of one ISC 2026 session by (part of) its title. Use search_isc2026_transcripts or get_isc2026_agenda first to find session titles.

tools.name: get_isc2026_agenda
tools.description: The ISC High Performance 2026 program (Hamburg, June 23-25): session blocks with times, halls, types and speakers, plus the recorded research-paper talks. Optionally filter by day.

tools.name: about_radixia
tools.description: Who is Radixia? Company profile, the four pillars, projects and contacts.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_posts, search_posts, get_post, list_tags, search_isc2026_transcripts, get_isc2026_session · Private data: about_radixia · Public sink: get_post, list_tags.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_posts, search_posts, get_post, list_tags, search_isc2026_transcripts, get_isc2026_session · Private data: about_radixia · Public sink: get_post, list_tags

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
